participant "TaskExecutionStrategy" as TES
participant "Action" as A
participant "Connection" as C
participant "SSH client/server connection" as SSH
participant "ssh daemon (or winrm service)" as SSHD

TES -> A: init(..)
TES -> A: init(..)
TES -> A: run()
A -> C: put_file()
C -> SSH: transfer module data
SSH -> SSHD: 
activate SSHD
SSHD -> SSHD: save module to disk
deactivate SSHD
SSHD --> SSH: 
SSH --> C: transfer complete
C --> A: return remote path
A -> C: exec_command()
C -> SSH: run module remotely
SSH -> SSHD: 
activate SSHD
SSHD -> SSHD: execute shell command
deactivate SSHD
SSHD --> SSH: 
SSH --> C: return response code, stdout, stderr
C --> A: return response code, stdout, stderr
A --> TES: return JSON

@enduml
